title: glandularia cabrerae
intro: Glandularia cabrerae, also known as Rock Pink or Dwarf Pink, is a perennial herb belonging to the Verbenaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Glandularia cabrerae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Glandularia cabrerae can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
